overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking along a winding dirt path through sunlit grasslands and forest edges. The character passes environmental details including fallen bodies and a small roadside shrine while exploring the natural landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland trail with scattered pine forests

events.description: passing dead bodies lying on the right side of the dirt path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through open grassland, passing fallen bodies on the right

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the grassland
tall golden-green grass covering the open fields
dense cluster of pine trees in the distance
fallen human remains lying beside the path
large rock formation visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a winding dirt path through open sunlit grassland. The landscape features tall golden grass and scattered pine forests in the mid-distance. Around the 8-second mark, the character passes by dead bodies lying on the right side of the path, with rocky outcrops visible further ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding trail through grassy hills with rising terrain

events.description: path curves gently to the left as the terrain rises on the left side

agents.ego_description: continuing along the winding path as the terrain becomes hillier on the left side

entered.detail: sloped grassy terrain rising beside the path

segments.scene_description: The path curves through grassland with a grassy hill rising on the left side. The terrain becomes more undulating as the character progresses, with pine trees now visible closer on the right. The dead bodies and distant rocks from the previous section are left behind as the trail winds through the hilly landscape.

events.description: passing a small stone shrine or structure on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking along the path as vegetation becomes denser and passing a small roadside shrine

entered.detail: small stone structure or shrine beside the path
thick cluster of deciduous trees close to the path

segments.scene_description: The trail continues through denser vegetation with trees closing in on the right side. Around the 50-second mark, the character passes a small stone shrine structure on the right side of the path. The surrounding forest becomes thicker while the path remains clear, winding through the increasingly wooded landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a winding dirt path that transitions from open, sunlit grasslands into a denser wooded landscape. It begins with the character traversing tall golden grass and scattered pine forests, passing dead bodies lying beside the trail near distant rocky outcrops. As the path curves, the terrain becomes more undulating with a grassy hill rising on the left and pine trees drawing closer on the right. The scene then shifts into thicker vegetation as the forest closes in, leading the character past a small stone shrine structure on the right side of the path. Finally, the trail winds deeper into the increasingly wooded environment while remaining clear under the canopy.
